enrichment.short_description: AI academic writing assistant that autocompletes text and links every claim to a traceable source citation.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Jenni AI helps researchers and students write cited papers faster with AI autocomplete, source-linked claims, and 10,000+ citation styles.

features.title: AI Autocomplete
features.description: Suggests text grounded in your uploaded papers, with citations added automatically as you write.

features.title: Traceable citations
features.description: Every AI-generated claim links back to the exact page and paragraph in the source PDF.

features.title: Reference import
features.description: Import existing libraries from Zotero or Mendeley, or search over 200 million papers directly in the app.

features.title: 10,000+ citation styles
features.description: Formats references in APA 7th, Chicago, Harvard, and thousands of other citation styles.

features.title: Reviews
features.description: Scans a draft's claims and flags statements that are unverified or contradicted by the cited sources.

features.title: Research Chat
features.description: Ask questions across an entire uploaded library and get answers with citations attached.

features.title: Real-time collaboration
features.description: Co-author documents with comments and version history.

pros: Free tier available with no credit card required
Citations are traceable to the exact source page, reducing fabricated references
Supports 10,000+ citation styles including APA, Chicago, and Harvard
Direct import from Zotero and Mendeley reference libraries
cons: No stated support for non-English writing on the site
No mobile app mentioned
Higher usage limits (unlimited autocomplete, edits, chat) require the $29/month Pro plan
No team or enterprise plan is advertised on the pricing page

faqs.question: Is there a free plan for Jenni AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jenni offers a free plan with 10 AI autocompletes per day, 10 PDF uploads, and limited AI edits, chat, and reviews, with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What citation styles does Jenni support?
faqs.answer: Jenni supports over 10,000 citation styles, including APA 7th edition, Chicago, and Harvard.

faqs.question: Can I import my existing reference library?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jenni lets you import references from Zotero or Mendeley, or search over 200 million papers directly.

faqs.question: How much does Jenni AI cost?
faqs.answer: Jenni has a free plan, a Plus plan at $12/month, and a Pro plan at $29/month, each billed monthly with annual discounts available.

faqs.question: Does Jenni check facts in my writing?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Reviews feature analyzes claims in a draft and flags statements that are unverified or contradicted by cited sources.

use_cases.title: Writing cited research papers
use_cases.description: Graduate students and PhD candidates draft papers with AI autocomplete that automatically cites uploaded source material.

use_cases.title: Literature review at scale
use_cases.description: Research labs use Research Chat to query an entire library of uploaded papers and get sourced answers.

use_cases.title: Compliant, cited reporting
use_cases.description: Policy analysts and pharma teams produce documents where every claim must trace back to a verifiable source.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Jenni AI?
paragraphs: Jenni AI is an AI writing assistant built for academic and research writing. It generates AI autocomplete suggestions grounded in a user's uploaded papers, and links every AI-assisted claim back to the exact page and paragraph of its source.
Beyond drafting, Jenni supports reference management with imports from Zotero and Mendeley, a search index of over 200 million papers, and formatting across more than 10,000 citation styles.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Jenni AI is for
paragraphs: Jenni is built for graduate students, PhD candidates, university researchers, and professionals in fields like pharma and policy analysis who need writing that is both fast and fully cited to source material.

enrichment.short_description: AI content writing tool that generates SEO-optimized blog posts, marketing copy, and images using GPT-4o.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: WordHero is an AI writing tool that generates blog posts, marketing copy, and images in 108 languages using GPT-4o, used by 30,000+ businesses.

features.title: One-click blog generation
features.description: Generates full blog posts instantly from a topic or keyword input.

features.title: Brand voice customization
features.description: Trains the AI to write in a specific brand voice, with multiple voices available depending on plan.

features.title: SEO keyword assistant
features.description: Built-in keyword tools aimed at optimizing generated content for search.

features.title: WordHero Art
features.description: Generates AI images to accompany written content.

features.title: Long-form editor
features.description: A dedicated editor for drafting and refining longer pieces of content.

features.title: AI chat with wizard mode
features.description: Interactive chat interface that guides content creation step by step.

features.title: 108-language content generation
features.description: Can generate written content in 108 languages.

pros: Backed by a 14-day money-back guarantee
Used by a large base of over 30,000 business owners, marketers, and writers
Supports content generation in 108 languages
Includes built-in AI image generation (WordHero Art)
cons: No free plan; only a money-back guarantee is offered
Infinity plan's listed monthly price ($99) is a discount from a stated $199, so pricing may vary over time
No team or enterprise plan is described on the pricing page

faqs.question: Does WordHero have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, WordHero does not offer a free plan, but it provides a 14-day money-back guarantee on paid plans.

faqs.question: How much does WordHero cost?
faqs.answer: The Creator plan is $49/month (or $29/month billed annually) and the Infinity plan is $99/month (or $79/month billed annually).

faqs.question: What AI models power WordHero?
faqs.answer: WordHero uses GPT-4o and GPT-4o mini alongside proprietary AI technology.

faqs.question: How many languages does WordHero support?
faqs.answer: WordHero can generate content in 108 languages.

use_cases.title: Blog content production
use_cases.description: Marketers and business owners generate SEO-oriented blog posts with one-click generation and a keyword assistant.

use_cases.title: Multilingual content creation
use_cases.description: Content teams produce written material in 108 supported languages for international audiences.

use_cases.title: Brand-voice copywriting
use_cases.description: Writers customize the AI's brand voice to keep marketing copy consistent across pieces.

features: Same features as monthly Creator plan
Enhanced Mode with advanced AI models
Same features as monthly Infinity plan

long_form_blocks.heading: What is WordHero?
paragraphs: WordHero is an AI writing platform focused on generating blog posts and marketing content quickly, using GPT-4o and GPT-4o mini alongside its own AI technology.
The platform includes an SEO keyword assistant, a long-form editor, brand voice customization, an AI image generator called WordHero Art, and support for generating content in 108 languages.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who WordHero is for
paragraphs: WordHero is aimed at business owners, marketers, writers, and content creators who need to produce blog and marketing content at volume, including in languages beyond English.

enrichment.short_description: AI writing assistant that turns notes into outlines and full drafts for essays, blogs, and other long-form content.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Moonbeam is an AI long-form writing assistant that turns notes into outlines and drafts using its Wizard tool and GPT-4-powered Smart Chat.

features.title: Wizard tool
features.description: Transforms rough notes into structured outlines and paragraphs.

features.title: Luna AI drafting
features.description: Generates first drafts of long-form content from simple prompts.

features.title: Smart Chat
features.description: A GPT-4-powered chat interface that gives real-time feedback and edits text.

features.title: Content Cluster
features.description: Generates 10 or more related content ideas from a single topic.

features.title: Custom Style Generator
features.description: Writes in the voice of a chosen author, comedian, or public figure.

features.title: Templates
features.description: Includes templates for blog posts, essays, technical guides, newsletters, and Twitter threads.

features.title: Collaboration Mode
features.description: Allows teams to edit documents together.

pros: 30-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
GPT-4-powered Smart Chat gives real-time editing feedback
Custom Style Generator can match a specific voice or tone
Ready-made templates for multiple content formats
cons: No free plan; only a 30-day money-back guarantee
Team plan is priced per user ($99/month/user), which can scale quickly for larger teams
No mobile app mentioned on the site

faqs.question: Does Moonbeam have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Moonbeam does not offer a permanent free plan; it offers a 30-day money-back guarantee on the Pro plan instead.

faqs.question: How much does Moonbeam cost?
faqs.answer: The Pro plan is $49/month billed yearly, and the Team plan is $99/month per user, billed monthly.

faqs.question: What AI model powers Moonbeam's chat feature?
faqs.answer: Smart Chat is powered by GPT-4.

faqs.question: Can teams collaborate in Moonbeam?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Team plan adds collaborative real-time editing and support for multiple users.

use_cases.title: Long-form essay writing
use_cases.description: Students and writers use the Wizard and Luna AI to turn notes into structured drafts.

use_cases.title: Blog and content production
use_cases.description: Content creators use templates and Content Cluster to plan and draft multiple articles.

use_cases.title: Team content collaboration
use_cases.description: Teams use Collaboration Mode on the Team plan to co-edit long-form documents.

features: Boss Mode, Moonbeam Chat, Ask Luna

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Moonbeam?
paragraphs: Moonbeam is an AI writing assistant focused on long-form content such as essays, blog posts, and technical guides. Its Wizard tool converts notes into outlines and paragraphs, while Luna AI can generate first drafts from a simple prompt.
A GPT-4-powered Smart Chat gives real-time feedback and editing suggestions, and the Custom Style Generator can rewrite content to match a chosen voice or tone.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Moonbeam is for
paragraphs: Moonbeam targets writers, students, content creators, and freelancers who need help structuring and drafting long-form written work, with a Team plan for collaborative content teams.

enrichment.short_description: AI writing extension that autocompletes sentences and emails directly in the browser to speed up typing.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Compose AI is a free Chrome extension that autocompletes emails and documents as you type, learning your personal writing voice.

features.title: Autocomplete
features.description: Suggests sentence completions as you type across supported platforms.

features.title: Personalization
features.description: Learns a user's writing 'voice' and suggests personalized phrases over time.

features.title: Tool integration
features.description: Integrates with a user's existing platforms and tools rather than requiring a separate app.

features.title: Chrome extension
features.description: Runs as a free Chrome browser plugin.

pros: Core autocomplete plugin is free to use forever
Learns and adapts to a user's personal writing style over time
Works inline across existing tools instead of a separate writing app
cons: Premium plan pricing is not publicly disclosed on the site
Only available as a Chrome browser extension, with no other platforms mentioned
No founding year, headquarters, or company details published on the site

faqs.question: Is Compose AI free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the core Chrome plugin is free to use forever, with a separate premium tier offering advanced personalization features.

faqs.question: What does Compose AI do?
faqs.answer: It autocompletes sentences and emails as you type, helping you write faster in your existing apps and tools.

faqs.question: Which browsers does Compose AI support?
faqs.answer: Compose AI is distributed as a Chrome browser extension.

use_cases.title: Faster email writing
use_cases.description: Professionals who write large volumes of email use autocomplete to draft messages faster.

use_cases.title: Document drafting
use_cases.description: Users draft documents faster with inline AI-suggested completions.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Compose AI?
paragraphs: Compose AI is a free Chrome extension that generates AI text autocompletions as users type emails and documents, aiming to cut down the time spent typing repetitive content.
It personalizes suggestions by learning a user's writing voice, and works inline within a person's existing platforms rather than requiring a separate application.

enrichment.short_description: AI email coaching platform that scores and rewrites sales emails to improve reply rates.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Lavender is an AI email coach for sales teams that scores and rewrites emails, plus an AI sales agent called Ora, as a Chrome extension.

features.title: Email Coach
features.description: A Chrome extension that analyzes and scores emails as you write them.

features.title: Ora
features.description: An AI sales agent designed to write emails modeled on top-performing sellers.

features.title: CRM Enrichment
features.description: Enriches CRM records to support more personalized outreach.

features.title: Sales Email Certification Course
features.description: A training course focused on writing effective sales emails.

features.title: Email intelligence
features.description: Analyzes patterns across billions of emails to inform coaching suggestions.

pros: Email Coach can be installed for free
Purpose-built for sales email writing rather than general-purpose writing
Ora AI agent models writing on top sales performers
Includes CRM enrichment alongside email coaching
cons: Full pricing for Ora and higher tiers is not listed publicly
Only distributed as a Chrome extension, with no other browser or platform mentioned
No stated headquarters, founding year, or company size

faqs.question: Is Lavender free?
faqs.answer: The Email Coach can be installed for free, with additional paid capabilities like Ora and CRM Enrichment.

faqs.question: What is Ora?
faqs.answer: Ora is Lavender's AI sales agent, designed to write emails modeled on top-performing sellers.

faqs.question: What browser does Lavender work in?
faqs.answer: Lavender's Email Coach is delivered as a Chrome browser extension.

faqs.question: Who is Lavender built for?
faqs.answer: Lavender is built for sales professionals, including SDRs, BDRs, Account Executives, and sales leaders.

use_cases.title: Cold email coaching
use_cases.description: SDRs and BDRs get real-time scoring and rewrite suggestions on outbound emails.

use_cases.title: Sales team coaching
use_cases.description: Sales leaders use email intelligence data to coach reps on writing more effective emails.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted outreach
use_cases.description: Account Executives use Ora to draft personalized sales emails automatically.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Lavender?
paragraphs: Lavender is an AI email coaching platform for sales teams. Its Email Coach, delivered as a Chrome extension, analyzes emails in real time and scores them to help reps improve reply rates.
The platform also includes Ora, an AI sales agent that writes emails modeled on top-performing sellers, along with CRM enrichment and a sales email certification course.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Lavender is for
paragraphs: Lavender is built for sales professionals — SDRs, BDRs, Account Executives, and sales leaders — who want to improve the quality and performance of their outbound email.

enrichment.short_description: AI sales engagement platform that automates prospecting, dialing, sequencing, and multi-channel outreach for B2B teams.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Regie.ai is an AI sales engagement platform combining AI prospecting agents, an AI dialer, and multi-channel sequencing for B2B sales teams.

features.title: AI Prospecting Agents
features.description: Handle lead research and generate personalized outreach messaging.

features.title: AI Dialer
features.description: Supports high-volume outbound calling, including a parallel dialer add-on.

features.title: Multi-channel orchestration
features.description: Coordinates outreach across phone, email, and social channels.

features.title: Behavioral intent signals
features.description: Surfaces enrichment and intent data to prioritize accounts and contacts.

features.title: Dynamic workflows
features.description: Adjusts sequencing automatically based on prospect engagement.

features.title: CRM integration
features.description: Syncs data with existing CRM systems.

features.title: Named account targeting
features.description: Targets specific accounts using signal-driven outreach.

pros: Unifies enrichment, dialing, email, and sequencing in a single platform
Recognized as a G2 Spring 2025 Grid Leader
Enterprise tier offers custom credit packages and dedicated support
Dynamic workflows adapt automatically to prospect engagement
cons: No free plan or free trial mentioned
Entry-level AI SEP plan requires a 10-seat annual contract minimum
Add-ons like data packages and parallel dialer carry significant extra cost

faqs.question: Does Regie.ai offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: No free plan or trial is mentioned on the pricing page; plans are sold as annual contracts.

faqs.question: How much does Regie.ai cost?
faqs.answer: The AI SEP plan starts at $180/user/month (10-seat minimum), and Force Multiplier Rep is $499/user/month (5-seat minimum), both on annual contracts.

faqs.question: Is there an enterprise option?
faqs.answer: Yes, Regie.ai offers a custom Enterprise plan with custom credit packages, dedicated IP/domain strategy, and dedicated support.

faqs.question: What channels does Regie.ai support?
faqs.answer: Regie.ai orchestrates outreach across phone (AI dialer), email, and social channels.

use_cases.title: Automated outbound prospecting
use_cases.description: SDR teams use AI Prospecting Agents and the AI Dialer to scale outbound activity.

use_cases.title: Account coverage at scale
use_cases.description: RevOps teams use named account targeting and intent signals to prioritize outreach.

use_cases.title: Enterprise sales outreach
use_cases.description: Enterprise sales orgs use the custom Enterprise tier for large-scale multi-channel campaigns.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Regie.ai?
paragraphs: Regie.ai is an AI sales engagement platform that combines AI prospecting agents, an AI dialer, and multi-channel sequencing to automate outbound sales workflows.
It uses behavioral intent signals and enrichment data to prioritize accounts, and its dynamic workflows adjust sequencing automatically based on how prospects engage.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Regie.ai is for
paragraphs: Regie.ai is built for B2B sales organizations — SDRs, Account Executives, sales leaders, and RevOps teams — running outbound programs at scale, sold on annual contracts with per-seat pricing.

enrichment.short_description: AI go-to-market assistant that generates on-brand sales and marketing assets like decks, landing pages, and deal rooms.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Mutiny is an AI GTM assistant that creates decks, landing pages, and deal rooms, with meeting prep, follow-ups, and pipeline reporting.

features.title: Asset generation
features.description: Creates on-brand personalized decks, landing pages, and deal rooms.

features.title: Meeting prep and follow-ups
features.description: Helps prepare for meetings and automates follow-up and multithreading tasks.

features.title: GTM playbooks and templates
features.description: Includes pre-loaded go-to-market playbooks and templates.

features.title: Slack and Claude integration
features.description: Connects to Slack and Claude along with email, calendar, docs, call recordings, and CRM systems.

features.title: Pipeline review and reporting
features.description: Supports pipeline review, executive reporting, and coaching.

features.title: Case study generation
features.description: Automates the creation of customer case studies.

pros: Free plan available with no credit card required
Integrates directly with Slack and Claude plus email, calendar, and CRM tools
Comes with pre-loaded GTM playbooks and templates
Add-on credit packs let Business/Enterprise customers scale usage without changing plans
cons: Free plan is capped at 30 credits/month and limits integrations to 30 days
Enterprise plan starts at $40,000/year
Usage is credit-based, which can limit heavy users on lower tiers

faqs.question: Does Mutiny have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mutiny offers a free plan for up to 5 team members with 5 daily credits (30/month max) and no credit card required.

faqs.question: How much does Mutiny cost?
faqs.answer: The Business plan is $50/month with 50 credits/month, and Enterprise starts at $40,000/year.

faqs.question: What does Mutiny integrate with?
faqs.answer: Mutiny integrates with Slack, Claude, email, calendar, docs, call recordings, and CRM systems.

faqs.question: Can I buy extra usage without upgrading my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Business and Enterprise customers can buy add-on credit packs (100 credits for $100) without changing plans.

use_cases.title: Sales meeting preparation
use_cases.description: Account Executives use Mutiny to prepare for meetings and automate follow-ups.

use_cases.title: Account-based marketing assets
use_cases.description: Marketing teams generate personalized decks and landing pages for ABM campaigns.

use_cases.title: Pipeline and coaching reviews
use_cases.description: Sales leaders use pipeline review and reporting features to coach reps.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Mutiny?
paragraphs: Mutiny is an AI go-to-market assistant that generates customer-facing assets such as personalized decks, landing pages, and deal rooms, and integrates with Slack and Claude alongside email, calendar, and CRM tools.
It also supports meeting preparation, follow-up automation, pipeline review, and case study generation using pre-loaded GTM playbooks and templates.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Mutiny is for
paragraphs: Mutiny is aimed at sales teams, marketing teams running account-based marketing, and go-to-market leaders who need to produce customer-facing assets and reporting without dedicated GTM engineering support.

enrichment.short_description: Enterprise AI platform that orchestrates brand-aware marketing content and campaigns through AI agents.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Typeface is an enterprise AI platform that uses agents to orchestrate on-brand marketing campaigns, used by companies like Asics and Google.

features.title: Arc Graph
features.description: Grounds AI-generated content in brand guidelines and audience context.

features.title: Arc Agents
features.description: Handles complex marketing tasks across channels and campaign stages.

features.title: Arc Spaces
features.description: Manages planning, creation, reviews, approvals, and publishing workflows.

features.title: Arc Forge
features.description: Converts workflows into custom agents with MCP, API, and integration support.

features.title: Guardrailed AI
features.description: Applies safety controls to keep AI-generated content on-brand and compliant.

pros: Used by large enterprises including Asics, Johnson Controls, Medibank, and Sally Beauty
Arc Graph grounds output in brand guidelines to reduce off-brand content
Arc Forge allows building custom agents with API and MCP integration
Supports the full campaign workflow from planning to publishing via Arc Spaces
cons: No public pricing listed on the website
No free plan or free trial mentioned
Appears to require a sales engagement rather than self-serve signup

faqs.question: How much does Typeface cost?
faqs.answer: Typeface does not publish pricing; it is positioned as an enterprise platform requiring direct contact.

faqs.question: What is Arc Forge?
faqs.answer: Arc Forge converts marketing workflows into custom agents with MCP, API, and integration support.

faqs.question: Who uses Typeface?
faqs.answer: Typeface is used by enterprise clients including Asics, Johnson Controls, Medibank, and Sally Beauty.

faqs.question: Does Typeface keep content on-brand?
faqs.answer: Yes, Arc Graph grounds generated content in brand guidelines and audience context, with guardrailed AI safety controls.

use_cases.title: Enterprise campaign orchestration
use_cases.description: Marketing teams use Arc Agents and Arc Spaces to run multi-channel campaigns at scale.

use_cases.title: Custom agent deployment
use_cases.description: IT teams use Arc Forge to build custom agents connected via API and MCP.

use_cases.title: Brand-consistent content creation
use_cases.description: Creative teams rely on Arc Graph to keep AI-generated content aligned with brand guidelines.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Typeface?
paragraphs: Typeface is an enterprise marketing AI platform built around 'Typeface Arc' — a set of components (Arc Graph, Arc Agents, Arc Spaces, and Arc Forge) that orchestrate people, agents, and systems to run brand-consistent campaigns at scale.
The platform includes guardrailed AI safety controls and is used by large organizations including Asics, Johnson Controls, Medibank, and Sally Beauty.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Typeface is for
paragraphs: Typeface targets enterprise marketing, IT, and creative teams that need to run large-scale, brand-governed campaigns with custom AI agents rather than self-serve individual users.

enrichment.short_description: AI content generation platform for regulated industries that creates and validates compliant marketing content.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Persado is an AI platform that creates, scores, and validates compliant marketing content for regulated industries like banking and insurance.

features.title: Create
features.description: Generates compliant, production-ready content across email, direct mail, web, social, and SMS.

features.title: Optimize
features.description: Scores existing assets for performance potential and compliance risk via a Deep Market Scan.

features.title: Automate
features.description: Selects the best-performing content variant in real time through CRM integrations.

features.title: Compliance validation
features.description: Checks content against 20+ regulatory frameworks.

features.title: Performance prediction
features.description: Scores content against a database of 120,000+ labeled campaign outcomes.

features.title: Brand voice guardrails
features.description: Enforces consistent tone and terminology across generated content.

features.title: Multi-agent system
features.description: Uses separate agents for performance scoring, compliance checking, and brand alignment.

pros: Built specifically for compliance-heavy industries with built-in regulatory checks
Performance predictions are informed by 1M+ analyzed A/B tests
Integrates with major marketing platforms including Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Adobe Campaign, Braze, and Optimizely
Offers both a managed Enterprise service and a self-service Studio option for Optimize
cons: No public pricing listed on the site
No free trial or free plan mentioned
Focused specifically on regulated industries, which may limit fit for general marketers

faqs.question: What industries does Persado serve?
faqs.answer: Persado is built for regulated industries such as banking, fintech, credit unions, mortgage lenders, insurance, and wealth management.

faqs.question: Does Persado check content for regulatory compliance?
faqs.answer: Yes, Persado validates content against more than 20 regulatory frameworks.

faqs.question: What pricing options does Persado offer?
faqs.answer: Persado offers an Enterprise managed service and a Studio self-service option for its Optimize product; specific prices are not published.

faqs.question: What platforms does Persado integrate with?
faqs.answer: Persado integrates with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Adobe Campaign, Braze, Optimizely, and other marketing platforms.

use_cases.title: Compliant marketing content creation
use_cases.description: Bank and fintech marketing teams generate content that is pre-checked against regulatory frameworks.

use_cases.title: Content performance scoring
use_cases.description: CRM managers score existing assets for performance potential and compliance risk before sending.

use_cases.title: Real-time content optimization
use_cases.description: Marketing operations teams use Automate to select the best-performing content variant at send time.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Persado?
paragraphs: Persado is an AI content platform built for regulated industries. It creates, scores, and validates marketing content across channels like email, direct mail, web, social, and SMS, checking each asset against more than 20 regulatory frameworks.
Its Optimize product scores existing content for performance and compliance risk, while Automate selects the best-performing variant in real time through CRM integrations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Persado is for
paragraphs: Persado is aimed at marketing teams in regulated industries — banks, fintechs, insurers, and wealth management firms — where content must be both effective and compliant with regulatory requirements.

name: Acrolinx
skip_reason: The official site shows an active rebrand notice ('Acrolinx is now Markup AI') and the trademark is now held by Markup AI Europe GmbH, indicating the product is transitioning to a new brand rather than being a stable standalone listing.
